messages.content: create minion card class for Hearthstone Javascript (2 attack and 2 health)

add minion class with aura +1 attack to all friendly minion while it is in board. add minion class with aura which cost 1 less for each friendly minion. add minion class with aura which reduce other minion’s cost in hand by 1 while it is in board. All three of these classes must be subsidiaries of the common class. Auras must triggered without calling when card is drawn or placed into board

1) I don't know where it is triggered
2) they auras can be trigger multiply times
each aura triggered only once. + if other minion add to the board, he must get aura bonus
no. If another minion adds to the board after AuraMinionAttack minion, he also get aura attack
its triggered once. New minion doesn't get attack
when new minion added to the board, old minion doesn't get new bonus attack (and don't lose)
its must work for every minion, not only for auraattackminion
